blockingIssues.description: `lib/codegen.ml` still special-cases imported `http::new_serve_mux` in `infer_expr_type`, so codegen retains direct `net/http` knowledge instead of consulting shared interop metadata.
`lib/codegen.ml` still hardcodes imported field inference for `Request.method`, so receiver-field typing for foreign symbols is not fully registry-driven.
`lib/codegen.ml` still hardcodes imported receiver-method inference for `form_value`, leaving another ad hoc `net/http` branch in codegen.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify whether "Write tests first" is mandatory and when `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` may remain true after workers refactor production code before adding tests, so scrutiny can rely on that flag consistently.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The review for `external-package-foundation-hooks` found the session transcript added production refactors before later creating `test/test_interop.ml`, while the worker handoff still reported `followedProcedure: true`; the same mismatch was already observed in earlier import-surface scrutiny.
